rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
AGREE contracts are scoped to component type or implementation annexes based on the validity of referenced elements
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics should guide minimal repairs that preserve unrelated architecture
AGREE syntax requires valid references to AADL features and types visible in the current scope
Component type annexes are for type-level assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for binding and assignment
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool, not integer or boolean
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes
anti_patterns: Adding assume statements to component implementations instead of types
Introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner scope rules
